title: Kharkiv: 207 drones intercepted
description: 6 killed, 60 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day as Kharkiv targeted for 2nd day in a row. The Air Force said Russia launched 207 drones, 181 of which were intercepted. At least 21 drones struck 14 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 13 sites.
description_en: 6 killed, 60 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day as Kharkiv targeted for 2nd day in a row. The Air Force said Russia launched 207 drones, 181 of which were intercepted. At least 21 drones struck 14 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 13 sites.

title: Energy infrastructure hit
description: The results of damage to the Hrushovaya oil depot, the Krasnoarmeysk NPS and the Krasny Yar LVDS have been confirmed. According to the results of preliminary reconnaissance of the affected fuel and energy infrastructure facilities of the Russian Federation on June 8, 2026, additional damage results have been confirmed. ⚡️Fire has been confirmed at the "Grushovaya" transshipment oil depot in the area of ​​the Hrushova Balka settlement of the Krasnodar Territory of the Russian Federation...
description_en: The results of damage to the Hrushovaya oil depot, the Krasnoarmeysk NPS and the Krasny Yar LVDS have been confirmed. title: Evacuation ordered

title: Drone strike
description: We continue to apply Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russian military facilities and the oil industry. In particular, this night Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingos hit a military factory in Cheboksary, which supplies the occupying army with components for drones and missiles. Thank you ZSU for the accuracy! The Kuibyshevsky oil refinery in the Samara region was also hit last night. The distance from the front line is...
description_en: We continue to apply Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russian military facilities and the oil industry. In particular, this night Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingos hit a military factory in Cheboksary, which supplies the occupying army with components for drones and missiles. Thank you ZSU for the accuracy! The Kuibyshevsky oil refinery in the Samara region was also hit last night. The distance from the front line is...
description_uk: Продовжуємо застосовувати українські далекобійні санкції проти російських воєнних об’єктів і нафтової галузі. Зокрема, цієї ночі українські FP-5 Flamingo влучили у воєнний завод у Чебоксарах, який забезпечує армію окупанта компонентами для дронів і ракет. Дякую ЗСУ за влучність! Уражено також за минулу ніч нафтопереробний завод «Куйбишевський» у Самарському регіоні. Відстань від лінії фронту –...

title: Kyiv: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Ukraine's race to winter: a 5.4-billion-euro plan, and a problem paying for it As Russian drones and missiles continue to pound Ukraine's war-damaged energy infrastructure, Kyiv is struggling to find funding for a 5.4 billion euro ($6.2 billion) "energy resilience plan" first announced in spring. While financing talks are ongoing with international partners, including the EU, Ukraine’s government...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Ukraine has created its own analogue of Patriot missiles and has already conducted the first tests, — FT Company Fire Point reported on the successful first flight tests of the FP-7.x missile, designed to intercept ballistic missiles and drones. According to the developers, one such missile will cost about $700,000 compared to approximately $3.8 million for the Patriot PAC-3. Production is planned to start already in August, and...
description_en: Ukraine has created its own analogue of Patriot missiles and has already conducted the first tests, — FT Company Fire Point reported on the successful first flight tests of the FP-7.x missile, designed to intercept ballistic missiles and drones. According to the developers, one such missile will cost about $700,000 compared to approximately $3.8 million for the Patriot PAC-3. Production is planned to start already in August, and...
description_uk: Украина создала собственный аналог ракет Patriot и уже провела первые испытания, — FT Компания Fire Point сообщила об успешных первых летных испытаниях ракеты FP-7.x, предназначенной для перехвата баллистических ракет и дронов. По словам разработчиков, одна такая ракета будет стоить около $700 тысяч против примерно $3,8 млн за Patriot PAC-3. Производство планируют запустить уже в августе, а...

description: And here are the "Flamingos" themselves in flight 🔥 The "VNIIR-Progress" plant, where the flight arrived, produces equipment for "Shakhedov", "Iskanderov" and "Kalibrov". The Ukrainian border is about 1,000 km away. A good migration distance for such a bird.
description_en: And here are the "Flamingos" themselves in flight 🔥 The "VNIIR-Progress" plant, where the flight arrived, produces equipment for "Shakhedov", "Iskanderov" and "Kalibrov". The Ukrainian border is about 1,000 km away. A good migration distance for such a bird.
description_uk: А вот и сами «Фламинго» в полете 🔥 Завод «ВНИИР-Прогресс», по которому был прилет, выпускает оборудование для «Шахедов», «Искандеров» и «Калибров». До украинской границы — около 1000 км. Неплохая дальность миграции для такой птицы.

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Update: Ukrainian missiles, drones reportedly hit oil refinery, manufacturing site in long-range strikes on Russia. An oil refinery in the Russian city of Samara was struck by Ukrainian drones, and a manufacturing facility in Cheboksary was struck by missiles overnight on June 10, social media channels reported.

title: Kyiv: Missile strike
description: Update: Russian military official killed in car bombing outside Moscow, media reports. The victim of a car bombing outside Moscow has been identified as Damir Davydov, a Russian military official responsible for missile and artillery ammunition supplies, according to Russian investigative outlet The Insider.
description_en: Update: Russian military official killed in car bombing outside Moscow, media reports. The victim of a car bombing outside Moscow has been identified as Damir Davydov, a Russian military official responsible for missile and artillery ammunition supplies, according to Russian investigative outlet The Insider.

title: Mariupol: Drone strike
description: Ukraine strikes ammo depot in Russia's Belgorod Oblast, confirms fuel tank destruction near Mariupol. In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.
description_en: Ukraine strikes ammo depot in Russia's Belgorod Oblast, confirms fuel tank destruction near Mariupol. In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.

title: Kherson: Drone strike
description: Chonhar Bridge struck in occupied Kherson Oblast as Ukraine steps up pressure on Russian logistics routes in Crimea. This is the second time in the past three days that the bridge has been closed, following an overnight strike on June 7 involving Ukrainian FP-2 and Behemot drones.
description_en: Chonhar Bridge struck in occupied Kherson Oblast as Ukraine steps up pressure on Russian logistics routes in Crimea. This is the second time in the past three days that the bridge has been closed, following an overnight strike on June 7 involving Ukrainian FP-2 and Behemot drones.

title: Sumy: Casualties reported
description: Man killed in Russian drone attack on Sumy Oblast A man was killed in a Russian drone attack on a residential area in the Putyvl hromada, Sumy Oblast, on 9 June. A hromada is an administrative unit designating a village, several villages, or a town, and their adjacent territories – ed. Read the full article on our website
